commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=eb3b34cf7ae42368b104a1b324907de924317464)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `google` runtime alias registration for the existing Gemini memory embedding adapter in the Google plugin entrypoint.

PR surface: Source +2. Total +2 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. `memorySearch.provider: "google"` can reach memory provider lookup while current main and `v2026.6.11` expose the Google memory adapter only as `gemini`, matching the reported unknown-provider path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next action needs maintainer confirmation of the provider-id contract plus contributor real behavior proof, not an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(google): register 'google' alias for memory embedding provider
target.author: dwc1997

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
